executiveSummary: All 6 new LTX-Video pipeline files (ltx2_t2v_distilled, ltx2_i2v, ltx2_i2v_distilled, ltx2_i2v_lora, ltx3_t2v, ltx3_i2v) have been implemented and pass the full CPU test suite (165 tests pass). Documentation is thorough: every pipeline has a module docstring with a Usage section, a run() docstring with full parameter documentation, and SMOKE_TEST.md enumerates one GPU invocation per pipeline. Two functional requirements are not complied with: FR-4 (ltxv_empty_latent_video() was not extended to accept an optional fps parameter) and FR-6 (the new pipeline modules are not listed/registered in pipelines/__init__.py, which remains an export-free stub). These gaps are minor: the fps parameter is accepted at the ltx3_i2v.run() level and documented as reserved, and the pipelines are directly importable despite not being listed in __init__.py.

verificationByFR.notes: All 6 new pipeline files are in comfy_diffusion/pipelines/ with correct snake_case names: ltx2_t2v_distilled.py, ltx2_i2v.py, ltx2_i2v_distilled.py, ltx2_i2v_lora.py, ltx3_t2v.py, ltx3_i2v.py.
All pipelines define module-level _*_DEST constants used in both manifest() and run() path resolution. run() derives default paths from these constants, keeping manifest and run in sync.

All torch, comfy.*, and comfy_diffusion.* heavy imports are deferred inside function bodies. Module-level imports are limited to __future__, pathlib, typing, and comfy_diffusion.downloader (lightweight). Each file passes the no_top_level_comfy_imports test.

ltxv_empty_latent_video() in latent.py retains its original signature (width, height, length=97, batch_size=1) — no fps parameter was added. The ltx3_i2v.run() accepts fps but cannot pass it downstream; the parameter is documented as reserved. FR-4 requires the latent.py function itself to be extended.
All path type annotations across the 6 pipeline files use str | Path, consistent with the project-wide pattern. No str | os.PathLike usage found.

comfy_diffusion/pipelines/__init__.py contains only a docstring ('The package itself exports nothing; import from the specific pipeline module.'). None of the 6 new pipelines — nor even the pre-existing ltx2_t2v — are listed or registered there. FR-6 requires new pipeline files to be listed in __init__.py.

verificationByUS.notes: ltx2_t2v_distilled.py: manifest() returns 3 HFModelEntry items (ltx-2-19b-distilled, gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed, ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0). run() accepts all required params with steps=8 default. ltxv_latent_upsample() is called after sample() and before vae_decode_batch_tiled(). CPU tests pass.

ltx2_i2v.py: manifest() returns 4 HFModelEntry items (dev-fp8 UNet, gemma TE, distilled-lora-384, spatial upscaler). run() accepts image param. ltxv_preprocess() is called before ltxv_img_to_video_inplace(). apply_lora() called with distilled LoRA after model load. CPU tests pass.

ltx2_i2v_distilled.py: manifest() returns 3 HFModelEntry items. run() mirrors ltx2_i2v.run() signature. Default steps=8. No apply_lora() call. ltxv_preprocess() called before ltxv_img_to_video_inplace(). CPU tests pass.

ltx2_i2v_lora.py: manifest() returns 4 HFModelEntry items (ltx-2-19b-dev UNet, gemma TE, base distilled LoRA, upscaler). Style LoRA excluded from manifest. run() accepts lora_path and lora_strength=1.0. Two apply_lora() calls: base first (strength 1.0), then style LoRA (lora_strength). Default width=1280, height=1280. No ltxv_preprocess (direct image load). CPU tests pass.

ltx3_t2v.py: manifest() returns 3 HFModelEntry items (ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-fp8, gemma TE, spatial upscaler). run() signature matches ltx2_t2v_distilled.run(). Default steps=8. ltxv_latent_upsample before vae_decode_batch_tiled. CPU tests pass.

ltx3_i2v.py: manifest() returns same 3 entries as ltx3_t2v — complies. run() adds image and fps parameters (fps: int = 24) — complies. AC03: fps is accepted but NOT forwarded to ltxv_empty_latent_video() (which lacks the parameter per the FR-4 gap); it is documented as reserved in both the inline comment and the run() docstring. The AC says 'if supported, else documented as reserved' — the documentation of reserved status is present and correct, making this AC technically satisfied. CPU tests and lint pass. Marked partially_comply due to the latent dependency on FR-4 being unresolved.

All 6 new pipelines have dedicated pytest test files in tests/. 165 tests pass on CPU (uv run pytest, no GPU). Each file mocks ModelManager, check_runtime, and heavy comfy calls so no GPU is required.

Every pipeline module has a docstring with a 'Usage' section containing a runnable snippet. Every run() has a full NumPy-style docstring listing all parameters with types and defaults. SMOKE_TEST.md contains dedicated sections for all 6 pipelines with one GPU invocation each.

minorObservations: ltx2_i2v_lora.py: the base distilled LoRA strength is hardcoded to 1.0 in the apply_lora() call (not user-configurable). This is consistent with the reference workflow but a caller may want to tune it. A base_lora_strength parameter could be added as a future improvement.

ltx3_i2v.py: the fps parameter is silently ignored at runtime (not forwarded to ltxv_empty_latent_video). While documented, callers setting fps != 24 will see no effect until FR-4 is resolved. A runtime warning would improve DX.

pipelines/__init__.py: the docstring states 'The package itself exports nothing' but FR-6 requires the new pipelines to be listed. If the design intent is to keep __init__.py export-free, FR-6 should be retroactively updated or a registry mechanism (e.g. __all__ listing submodule names, or a PIPELINES list) should be added without re-exporting symbols.

ltx2_i2v.py and ltx2_i2v_distilled.py use hasattr(image, 'mode') to distinguish PIL images from paths. This is a duck-typing heuristic that could fail for unusual image objects. A stricter isinstance(image, PIL.Image.Image) check (deferred) would be more robust.

All 6 pipelines call check_runtime() at the top of run(). This is correct but does not prevent the ModelManager instantiation from failing if the submodule is missing and check_runtime returns no error (edge case in unit tests where runtime is mocked).
conclusionsAndRecommendations: The iteration is substantially complete: 6 of 6 pipeline files are implemented, all CPU tests pass, and documentation is thorough. Two FRs are non-compliant: FR-4 (ltxv_empty_latent_video lacks fps) and FR-6 (pipelines/__init__.py has no module listing). FR-4 is a straightforward one-line signature extension; FR-6 requires agreeing on the registration pattern (import aliases vs. a PIPELINES list vs. __all__). These should be addressed in the refactor pass. Additionally, the silent fps no-op in ltx3_i2v deserves a runtime warning once FR-4 is resolved.
